# AspectRatio

Constrains content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/aspect-ratio
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="aspect-ratio"
  example={0}
  code={`<div style={{ width: 320 }}>
  <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}>
    <img alt="Sand dunes under a clear sky" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500530855697-b586d89ba3ee?w=640&h=360&fit=crop" style={{ borderRadius: 8 }} />
  </AspectRatio>
</div>`}
/>

```tsx
<div style={{ width: 320 }}>
  <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}>
    <img
      alt="Sand dunes under a clear sky"
      src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500530855697-b586d89ba3ee?w=640&h=360&fit=crop"
      style={{ borderRadius: 8 }}
    />
  </AspectRatio>
</div>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="aspect-ratio"
  example={1}
  code={`<div style={{ width: 200 }}>
  <AspectRatio ratio={1}>
    <div style={{ alignItems: "center", border: "1px solid var(--colors-border-default)", borderRadius: 8, color: "var(--colors-fg-muted)", display: "flex", justifyContent: "center" }}>1 : 1</div>
  </AspectRatio>
</div>`}
/>

```tsx
<div style={{ width: 200 }}>
  <AspectRatio ratio={1}>
    <div
      style={{
        alignItems: 'center',
        border: '1px solid var(--colors-border-default)',
        borderRadius: 8,
        color: 'var(--colors-fg-muted)',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
      }}
    >
      1 : 1
    </div>
  </AspectRatio>
</div>
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                  |
| --------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `asChild` | `boolean` | No       | -       | Render the single child element instead of a wrapping \`<div>\`.             |
| `ratio`   | `number`  | No       | -       | Desired width-to-height ratio (e.g. \`16 / 9\`). Defaults to \`1\` (square). |

## Variants

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
